decks.notes: The main concept of this Azorius Aggro deck is to aggressively play flying creatures like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies to deal damage to the opponent quickly. Supporting cards like Starfield Shepherd and Quantum Riddler help to protect and strengthen the flying creatures. Utilizing cards like Springleaf Drum and flooded lands helps to ramp up mana quickly for bigger plays. Erode and Seam Rip provide removal options, while Daydream and Practiced Offense can give added boosts to the creatures. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, evasive threats and control the board to secure a victory.

The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using primarily Green creatures and spells. The focus is on quickly building a strong board presence and applying pressure to the opponent, while also having some control elements with removal and protection spells. The deck utilizes ramp with Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, as well as card draw with Keen-Eyed Curator to maintain momentum. Overall, the goal is to maintain aggression and tempo, while also having some flexibility to adapt to different situations.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming your opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and spells. By efficiently utilizing cheap spells like Burst Lightning and Opt to control the board and maintain pressure, you can utilize powerful finishers like Slickshot Show-Off and Molten-Core Maestro to quickly close out games. The deck also includes cards like Secret Identity and Elusive Otter to protect key threats and disrupt your opponent's game plan. With a focus on speed and precision, this deck aims to win the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on aggressive strategies using a mix of creatures and spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It utilizes cheap creatures like Fanatical Firebrand and Hired Claw to apply early pressure, while maintaining a strong board presence with powerful creatures like Nova Hellkite and Magebane Lizard. The deck also includes spells like Burst Lightning and Scorching Shot to remove threats and clear the way for more damage. By combining creature aggression with direct damage spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and win the game quickly.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by manipulating the opponent's board state and hand through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. It aims to stabilize the game by using cards like Tablet of Discovery and Jeskai Revelation to gain card advantage and generate resources. Additionally, it utilizes a mix of versatile removal options like Lightning Helix and Inevitable Defeat to handle threats efficiently. The land base is optimized for a balance of colors and includes utility lands like Great Hall of the Biblioplex for additional card draw.

The deck focuses on utilizing a variety of control spells and card draw to maintain board presence and disrupt opponents. It includes a mix of removal spells, counterspells, and card advantage tools to outvalue opponents and control the pace of the game. The deck also includes a number of versatile land cards to ensure the right colors of mana are available when needed. Overall, the strategy revolves around controlling the game through efficient removal and card advantage, leading to victory through attrition or overwhelming advantages.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on building a board presence quickly with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. The deck also utilizes ramp with Llanowar Elves and strong finishers like Mossborn Hydra and Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam. Erode helps control the battlefield, while Earthbender Ascension and Bushwhack provide additional power and resilience. Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage ensure smooth mana fixing, while Hushwood Verge and Ba Sing Se provide additional lands. With a mix of aggression and control, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its efficient creatures and powerful spells.

This combo-reanimator deck focuses on using cards like Deceit, Requiting Hex, and Winternight Stories to bring powerful creatures like Superior Spider-Man and Overlord of the Balemurk back from the graveyard. The deck also includes removal spells like Shoot the Sheriff and Bitter Triumph to control the board. The land base is designed to support the deck's color requirements with cards like Gloomlake Verge and Watery Grave. Overall, the strategy revolves around manipulating the graveyard and using powerful creatures to overwhelm the opponent.

This Dimir Aggro deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a combination of evasive creatures like Spyglass Siren and Floodpits Drowner, while also maintaining card advantage through Enduring Curiosity and Dream Beavers. Cecil, Dark Knight and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares provide additional pressure and disruption, while Requiting Hex and Shoot the Sheriff offer removal options. The mana base is designed to support both colors efficiently, allowing for a smooth curve of threats and answers. The deck aims to apply constant pressure and control the board to secure a quick victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing low-cost, aggressive creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off to deal quick damage to the opponent. It also includes various instants and sorceries like Burst Lightning and Opt to control the board and maintain pressure. The main strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a constant stream of threats and efficiently use card draw and bounce effects to maintain tempo. With an emphasis on speed and versatility, this UR Aggro deck aims to quickly close out games before the opponent can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to apply pressure early and maintain tempo throughout the game. By utilizing efficient creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, backed up by cheap spells such as Burst Lightning and Opt, the deck aims to control the board and chip away at the opponent's life total quickly. The inclusion of disruptive spells like Spell Pierce and bounce spells like Boomerang Basics further adds to the deck's ability to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes card draw and additional burn spells to keep up the pressure and finish the game swiftly.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. This Mardu Aggro deck utilizes a combination of creatures with evasion, direct damage spells, and combat tricks to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. Bloodghast and Marauding Mako provide recurring threats, while Tersa Lightshatter and Moonshadow offer evasion to push through damage. The deck also includes a mix of removal spells and combat tricks to maintain board control. Additionally, the mana base is designed to support a fast and consistent curve.

This deck focuses on utilizing various creatures and spells to quickly amass resources and control the board until the player can achieve a game-winning combo with Omniscience. The creatures provide aggression and defense, while the spells offer disruption and card advantage. The deck aims to set up a favorable board state and then drop Omniscience to cast multiple spells in a turn for a decisive victory. The mana base is designed to support the casting of diverse spells and creatures efficiently. The key strategy is to control the game until the powerful combo can be unleashed.

This deck focuses on creating a fast and aggressive board presence, utilizing cards that deal damage quickly and efficiently. The key strategy is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with creatures like Ashling, Rekindled and Flamebraider, while also using spells like Burst Lightning and Ill-Timed Explosion to clear the way for attacks. The deck also includes cards that provide additional benefits such as Deceit for card advantage and Wistfulness for extra damage. By combining these aggressive creatures and powerful spells, the deck aims to win the game as quickly as possible.

The key concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a strong aggressive strategy using efficient creatures such as Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. The deck utilizes mana acceleration from cards like Llanowar Elves and focuses on creating a wide board presence. Cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension help to pump up creatures and deal damage efficiently. Additionally, the deck includes some control elements like Erode and Snakeskin Veil to protect its creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The mana base is well-rounded with a mix of green and white sources for consistency.

The deck primarily focuses on utilizing a combination of cards to bring powerful creatures back from the graveyard, known as reanimation. By strategically using cards like Deceit and Requiting Hex, along with graveyard manipulation spells like Stock Up and Deadly Cover-Up, the deck aims to quickly bring out high-impact creatures like Superior Spider-Man and Doomsday Excruciator to overwhelm the opponent. The inclusion of control elements like Duress and Shoot the Sheriff helps to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining a strong reanimation game plan.
